expected_effect: Fix 2 intent mismatches, 1 signal pollution, 1 retired gene tag, 1 result text/scope correction across narrative and MEMORY.md
rationale: Narrative entries for 2026-03-26 have INNOVATE intent on optimize-category genes (gene_gep_optimize_prompt_and_assets + gene_auto_53538cc4), raw Chinese in signals, missing retired tag, and copy-pasted scope text. MEMORY.md #0123/#0125 have matching intent errors.

preconditions: need stricter, auditable evolution protocol outputs
strategy: Extract signals and determine selection rationale via Selector JSON

Reduce noise and ambiguity; enforce strict output schema
Append cycle record to MEMORY.md history table (never overwrite existing entries)

Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene definitions, create Capsule on success

summary: Fixed 2 intent mismatches (INNOVATE→OPTIMIZE), 1 signal decontamination (raw Chinese→append_only_history), 1 retired gene tag addition, 1 result text/scope correction (9/178→1/2) across evolution_narrative.md + MEMORY.md, with genes.json epigenetic mark
